---
title: "Selected Projects"
---

## Research & Applied Projects

- **RO1 Data Visualization**
  Provide the Zip Code-level HIV/AIDS-related statistics among people with HIV (PWH) who have a current Miami-Dade residential Zip Code and were diagnosed from 2019 to 2021. 
  [View project →](projects/R01_visualization.qmd)
  
- **Outlier Analysis**  
  Penalized Lasso regression
  [View project →](projects/outlier_analysis.qmd)

- **The Benefit of Molecular Epidemiology in San Diego**  
  Lasso regression
  [View project →](projects/sesame_project.qmd)

- **Data Imputation for Exposure Category**  
  Lasso regression
  [View project →](projects/data_imputation.qmd)

- **Create Analytic File**  
  Lasso regression
  [View project →](projects/analytic_file.qmd)
